arts.ttl: WATCH: Alvaro Morata makes up for penalty miss by scoring Spain’s second against Serbia
arts.sum: Spain are edging ever closer to booking their place in the finals of the UEFA Nations League. They led early on in their MD4 clash against Serbia, and midway through the second half, they have now added a second, thus establishing breathing space. It was Aymeric Laporte that scored the opening goal after only five […] The post WATCH: Alvaro Morata makes up for penalty miss by scoring Spain’s second against Serbia appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Spain vs Serbia: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Serbia's first win of their Nations League campaign leaves them with a chance of snatching top spot and they'll move to seven points alongside Spain should they record a historic victory in this fixture. Spain wrap up their October schedule with another UEFA Nations League clash on home soil with Serbia visiting Cordoba on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool & Man City among clubs tracking 17-year-old Serbia prodigy
arts.sum: The 17-year-old started the season on fire on dual registration terms with second tier side Graficar Beograd and was recalled by Red Star following the September international break. Maksimovic, who was born in 2007, recently became Serbia's youngest ever player when he made his senior international debut during Saturday's UEFA Nations League win over Switzerland.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal injury: Barcelona winger's potential return date
arts.sum: Barcelona's excellent start to the Hansi Flick era has been spearheaded by 17-year-old sensation Lamine Yamal but La Blaugrana have been left sweating on his fitness. Yamal was named in the Luis de la Fuente's starting XI for the 1-0 Nations League victory over Denmark at the weekend, with Martin Zubimendi eventually providing the winning goal for the Euro 2024 champions in the 79th minute.

arts.ttl: Spain predicted XI vs Serbia: Lamine Yamal out, Álex Baena in
arts.sum: Spain are set to host Serbia in Córdoba in what will be Nations League A action in the fourth matchday of the competition. Spain lead the way in their group…

arts.ttl: Spain boss hits back at critics after Lamine Yamal injury
arts.sum: Spain boss Luis de la Fuente has fired back after receiving criticism for overworking Barcelona's Lamine Yamal, defiantly insisting that the national team staff "are not kamikazes". Barcelona's Gavi, Pedri and Ansu Fati have all suffered long-term injuries in recent years after a heavy match schedule for their club and the Spain national team.

arts.ttl: How Real Madrid and Spain are reviving the art of long-range shooting
arts.sum: For an art form that is allegedly dying out, long-distance goals have played a big part in Spanish football recently, especially for Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Transfer Talk Update: Nathan Butler-Oyedeji, Kai Havertz, Nico Williams
